data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for correlation IDs.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of correlation IDs for cross-system tracing, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of correlation IDs. Without this evidence, it is impossible to determine whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of correlation IDs for cross-system tracing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for correlation ID implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete API reads that demonstrate the presence of correlation IDs in the system.
